name: WFBE_NEURODEF_FORT_OP
notes: OBSERVATION POST (fortification, side-neutral, 0 gun-AI). Purpose is to SEE, not to be seen or to slug it out. Soldier logic: an elevated bunker-tower gives the observer height and long fields of view over the approach (+Y) while a camo net breaks up its silhouette so it does not read as an obvious tower from distance. A low bag-fence ring at the base is a protected fallback / self-defence position for when the OP is compromised, NOT a fighting bastion — an OP that looks like a strongpoint gets shelled. Ammo/supply cached low behind the tower. A single wire run and the tight footprint keep it discreet; the rear is open as the covered withdrawal route (an OP must be able to bug out). Concealment over firepower throughout.

objs.role: ELEVATED OBSERVATION — bunker-tower, long view over the approach
low fallback ring at the base (self-defence, not a bastion)
supply cache — low, behind the tower
single forward wire — early warning, stays discreet
